info.title: Deployify
info.description: Deploy .NET Aspire AppHost projects to any platform — Nomad, Kubernetes, Docker Compose, AWS ECS, Azure Container Apps, and Nomad + Consul Connect.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: deployify – deploy .NET Aspire AppHost projects to any target (Nomad, Kubernetes, Compose, …)

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialise deployify in an Aspire AppHost project.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Update settings on an existing environment.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate deployment artefacts (HCL, manifests, compose files) without contacting the cluster.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate generated artefacts against the target.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Preview changes that would be applied to the target.

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Build and push service images or artefacts.

commands.name: ci
commands.description: Run the full generate → validate → plan → apply pipeline for CI/CD.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watch for source changes and automatically re-run generate + plan.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Display a human-readable summary of all services.

commands.name: graph
commands.description: Display a dependency graph of all services.

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Show differences between local manifest and the running target.
